data.title: Scilex Explores Strategic Options, Analyst Initiates On Blockbuster Potential For Sciatica Pain Candidate
data.description: Alliance Global Partners has initiated coverage on Scilex Holding Company. The company explores strategic options for its subsidiary, Scilex Pharma, including potential spinoffs and dividend distributions, while anticipating significant sales from its pain treatment candidate, SEMDEXA.
